segments.text: Most businesses are losing money right now without knowing it.
And the reason is always the same one mistake.
I've seen this kill seven-figure companies in under a year.
Here's what it is and how you fix it in the next 48 hours.
Most founders focus on revenue. That's the wrong metric. The only number that matters is contribution margin.
When margin drops below 40 percent you are funding your own collapse. Every new customer accelerates the problem.
Fix it by cutting your three lowest-margin products immediately. Not later. This week.
The businesses that survive the next five years will be the ones who know their numbers cold.
